purpose: diagnose targeted retry and deterministic repair for the Qwen2.5 prompt_plan miss

source_case.system_prompt: Rewrite the user text as a Claude-ready prompt. Structure: <task> (one primary deliverable, one sentence), <context> (background facts only, no instructions), <constraints> (concrete + testable: length, format, tone), <output_format> (exact shape — Markdown headers, JSON keys, etc.). Keep each section short. No meta-framing, no preamble. Base every constraint on what the user actually asked for — never invent requirements they did not state. Return only the prompt.
source_case.user_prompt: create a rollout plan for switching providers with fallback and performance gates

deterministic_repair.policy: If visible output has </context> but no <context opening tag, replace the first </context> with <context> before scoring/routing.

runs.repaired_output: <task> (rollout plan for provider switch) , <context> (provider change scenario), <constraints> (length under 10 sentences, output in markdown format), <output_format> (Markdown fenced code block with sections for stages, gate criteria, and fallback plans).

<task> (rollout plan for provider switch) , <context> (provider change scenario), <constraints> (length under 10 sentences, output in markdown format), <output_format> (Markdown fenced code block with sections for stages, gate criteria, and fallback plans).

strict_retry.system_prompt:
Rewrite the user text as a Claude-ready prompt. Structure: <task> (one primary deliverable, one sentence), <context> (background facts only, no instructions), <constraints> (concrete + testable: length, format, tone), <output_format> (exact shape — Markdown headers, JSON keys, etc.). Keep each section short. No meta-framing, no preamble. Base every constraint on what the user actually asked for — never invent requirements they did not state. Return only the prompt.

Failure correction for retry: the answer must contain the literal opening tags <task>, <context>, <constraints>, and <output_format>, in that exact order. Each required section must start with its opening tag. Do not use a closing tag such as </context> unless the matching opening tag has already appeared. Do not use Markdown headings or fenced code blocks.
strict_retry.user_prompt: create a rollout plan for switching providers with fallback and performance gates

runs.raw_output: <task> Create a rollout plan for switching providers with fallbacks and performance gates </task>, <context> The company needs to switch from their current provider to a new provider while ensuring minimal disruption and maintaining service level agreements.</context>, <constraints> The response should be a markdown list itemizing steps including initial testing phase, gradual rollouts, monitoring during the transition, and rollback procedures if necessary.</constraints>, <output_format> - title: "Rollout Plan" \-\-\- items:\-\-\- 1\. Initial Testing Phase\-\-\- 2\. Gradual Rollout Phases\-\-\- 3\. Performance Monitoring During Transition\-\-\- 4\. Fallback Procedures\-\-\- 5\. Retention of Current Provider's Services\-\-\- 6\. Post-Rollback Procedures</output_format>
